title: SAML 2.0 Service Provider Configuration
description: Configuration for a SAML 2.0 Service Provider federation.

artifact_lifetime.description: The number of seconds that an artifact is valid. The default value is 120. This setting is enabled only when HTTP artifact binding has been enabled.

assertion_consumer_services.description: Endpoints at a Service Provider that receive SAML assertions.

artifact_resolution_services.description: Endpoints where artifacts are exchanged for actual SAML messages. Required if artifact binding is enabled.

company_name.description: The name of the company that creates the identity provider or service provider.

encryption_settings.description: The encryption and decryption configurations for SAML messages.

manage_name_id_services.description: Endpoints that accept SAML name ID management requests or responses.

message_valid_time.description: The number of seconds that a message is valid. The default value is 300.

message_issuer_format.description: The format of the issuer of SAML message. The default value is 'urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:entity'.

message_issuer_name_qualifier.description: The name qualifier of the issuer of SAML messaged.

point_of_contact_url.description: The endpoint URL of the point of contact server. The point of contact server is a reverse proxy server that is configured in front of the runtime listening interfaces. The format is http[s]://hostname[:portnumber]/[junction]/sps.

provider_id.description: A unique identifier that identifies the provider to its partner provider. If not provided or an empty string is provided, the default value is <point of contact URL>/<federation name>/saml20.

session_timeout.description: The number of seconds that the SAML session remains valid. The default value is 7200.

signature_settings.description: The signing and validation configurations for SAML messages and assertions.

single_logout_service.description: Endpoints that accept SAML logout requests or responses.

alias_service_settings.description: The alias service settings to store the user alias.
